generationOptions.userSteeringPrompt:
Create a comprehensive investor pitch deck for StoneSightAI based on the source material. 

The deck should include the following sections:
1. Title Slide: Disrupting the Architectural Surface Industry through 360° Generative Motion Synthesis [42].
2. The Problem: 'Closing the Vision Gap' - Explain why static 2D renders fail to close deals in a $157B market and the cognitive load they place on consumers [1, 20, 21, 43].
3. Market Opportunity: Highlight the $157.7B global countertop market and the explosive 23.1% CAGR of 3D visualization software [1, 3, 44].
4. The Technological Gap: Contrast current incumbents like Cosentino (demo-centric WebGL) and Caesarstone (static 'sticker' effects) with the photorealistic generative AI approach [5, 7, 16, 45, 47, 48].
5. The Solution: Architectural Motion Synthesis - explain the generation of 180° clockwise and anti-clockwise videos from a single photo [10, 49, 50].
6. Why it Works: Explain the concept of 'Temporal Parallax' and how motion builds trust and conveys material presence [13, 21].
7. Value Proposition for Fabricators: Focus on reduced re-work, accelerated approvals, and 'Instagram-ready' content [34, 51].
8. Strategic Roadmap: Launching in the luxury UAE/Dubai market and partnering with the 'Middle Market' (e.g., Gemini Worktops) [15, 25, 39].
9. Competitive Moat: Emphasize domain specificity in stone (veining, light scattering) versus general-purpose AI models [32, 33, 35, 36].
10. Contact/Closing: Join the movement from static to cinematic [53].
